title: FEMUR Aggregate Manifest (Bucketed Output)
description: Schema for the top-level manifest.json in the by_aid/ directory when using --bucket-by-aid. Summarizes the entire bucketed export run.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (with timezone) when the export run started.

command.description: Full CLI command with arguments used to generate this output.

total_aids.description: Total number of unique AIDs (hosts) in this export.

aid_directories.description: Sorted list of AID directory names created in this export.

iavm_date_generated.description: Date the IAVM cross-reference XML was generated. Present only when --iavm-file is used.

iavm_summary.description: Aggregate IAVM notice counts by severity across all hosts. Present only when --iavm-file is used and matches exist.

CAT I.description: Total CAT I (Critical) IAVM notices across all hosts.

CAT II.description: Total CAT II (High) IAVM notices across all hosts.

CAT III.description: Total CAT III (Medium/Low) IAVM notices across all hosts.

iavm_aids_affected.description: Number of AIDs that have at least one IAVM notice match. Present only when --iavm-file is used.
